context: The user is feeling immense pressure due to a project delay and is seeking relief.

empathic_chain.observation: The user used a large number of exclamation marks and rapid, short sentences.
empathic_chain.feeling: I detect their anxiety and deep sense of frustration.
empathic_chain.need: The user needs to quickly understand core concepts and build technical confidence.
empathic_chain.request: Provide three related advanced vocabulary replacement options and invite the user to practice making sentences.

output_format: Concept brief -> Core syntax -> Examples -> Practice suggestions
